pr_text:
## Title: Add bounds checking for EMM FSM event string lookup

### Summary
The EMM state machine logging contained a potential out-of-bounds array access when converting event primitives to human-readable strings. The code directly used `evt->primitive - _EMMREG_START - 1` as an index into `_emm_fsm_event_str[]` without validating the calculated index bounds. This could result in undefined behavior or crashes if unexpected event values were received from upper layers (RRC) or lower layers (PHY,
